name: Shrimp Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Green or red bell pepper, chopped
1/2 tbsp Low-sodium soy sauce (or Kitchen Bouquet)
2 lb Medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook okra in canola oil over low heat for 30 to 40 minutes until it is no longer stringy, stirring occasionally.
2. Add chopped onion, parsley, bell pepper, garlic, celery, paprika, and file powder. Cook until onions are soft, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the Worcestershire sauce and cooking liquid (or Kitchen Bouquet). Cook until hot and bubbly.
4. Thin the sauce with water to reach the desired consistency.
5. Just before serving, add shrimp and crabmeat, then cook at a low boil for 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Season with salt and Tabasco to taste.
7. Serve warm. Serves 8-10.
